payload.answer: This appears to be a new contextual preference about your morning routine. I can offer ways to handle it, but I won’t save or modify memory from this step.
repair_options: Add this as a separate preference: usually prefers reading technical papers in the morning before checking email.
Keep it as contextual information for this conversation only, without adding it to memory.
If there is an existing morning routine or reading preference memory, review it first and decide whether to keep both, merge, or update.
